content.json:
## Defender XDR Activity Audit
---
Audit administrative and security-sensitive activity from Defender XDR using the `CloudAppEvents` table in Microsoft Sentinel. This workbook focuses on high-risk actions, control-plane changes, device response actions, and Defender-to-Sentinel integration events.
**Credits:** Inspired by Bert-Jan Pals' Audit Defender XDR Activities article: https://kqlquery.com/posts/audit-defender-xdr/

parameters.name: Workspace
parameters.label: Log Analytics Workspace
parameters.description: Select the Sentinel workspace that contains CloudAppEvents data.
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| project id, name, location, resourceGroup, subscriptionId
| order by name asc

parameters.name: ShowHelp
parameters.label: Show Help
parameters.description: Show setup, collection prerequisites, and validation steps.

content.json:
## Help
---
### Collection prerequisites
- Turn on **Unified audit log** integration in Defender XDR.
- Ensure the **Microsoft 365 connector** in Defender for Cloud Apps is enabled and collecting Office 365 activities so Defender XDR actions land in `CloudAppEvents`.
- Confirm data is arriving with a quick check: `CloudAppEvents | extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload) | where Workload contains "Defender" | summarize count()`

### Validation approach
- Use a short time range such as 24 hours when validating changes.
- Perform one known admin action, wait for ingestion, then confirm the corresponding `ActionType` appears in `CloudAppEvents`.
- If a section stays empty, validate the specific action type first in Logs before troubleshooting workbook rendering.

### Common test activities
- Download an offboarding package in Defender for Endpoint.
- Isolate a test device, then release it from isolation.
- Create, disable, or delete a test custom detection rule.
- Toggle a non-production advanced feature in a test tenant.
- Run a manual AV scan or collect a benign test file from a lab endpoint.

---
## Overview
Baseline volume and high-level triage for Defender XDR audit activity.

### Overview help
- This section assumes Defender XDR audit data is already present in `CloudAppEvents`.
- Validate by running a broad query first: `CloudAppEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago(1d) | extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload) | where Workload contains "Defender" | summarize count() by ActionType`.
- Expected result: tiles should show non-zero values after any Defender admin activity in the selected period.

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload)
| where Workload contains "Defender"
| summarize Count = count()
| extend Metric = "Audit Events"
content.title: Total Defender Audit Events

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload)
| where Workload contains "Defender"
| summarize Count = dcountif(AccountDisplayName, isnotempty(AccountDisplayName))
| extend Metric = "Actors"
content.title: Distinct Actors

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload)
| where Workload contains "Defender"
| extend IsHighRisk = case(
    ActionType == "DownloadOffboardingPkg", 1,
    ActionType == "ReleaseFromIsolation", 1,
    ActionType == "DeleteCustomDetection", 1,
    ActionType == "SentinelDisconnectWorkspace", 1,
    ActionType == "SensorDeleted", 1,
    ActionType == "ExclusionConfigurationAdded", 1,
    ActionType == "SetAdvancedFeatures" and tobool(parse_json(RawEventData).SettingsNewValue) == false, 1,
    ActionType == "ChangeCustomDetectionRuleStatus" and tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).IsEnabled) == "false", 1,
    0
)
| summarize Count = countif(IsHighRisk == 1)
| extend Metric = "High-Risk Events"
content.title: High-Risk Events

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload)
| where Workload contains "Defender"
| summarize Count = dcount(Workload)
| extend Metric = "Defender Workloads"
content.title: Defender Workloads

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload)
| where Workload contains "Defender"
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), ActionType
| top 10 by Count desc
| render timechart
content.title: Daily Activity by Action Type

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload)
| where Workload contains "Defender"
| summarize Count = count() by ActionType
| top 15 by Count desc
content.title: Top Audit Actions

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload)
| where Workload contains "Defender"
| extend UserId = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).UserId)
| extend DeviceName = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).DeviceName)
| extend SettingName = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).SettingName)
| extend Severity = case(
    ActionType == "DownloadOffboardingPkg", "Critical",
    ActionType == "ReleaseFromIsolation", "High",
    ActionType == "DeleteCustomDetection", "High",
    ActionType == "SentinelDisconnectWorkspace", "High",
    ActionType == "SensorDeleted", "High",
    ActionType == "ExclusionConfigurationAdded", "Medium",
    ActionType == "SetAdvancedFeatures" and tobool(parse_json(RawEventData).SettingsNewValue) == false, "High",
    ActionType == "ChangeCustomDetectionRuleStatus" and tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).IsEnabled) == "false", "High",
    "Info"
)
| where Severity != "Info"
| project TimeGenerated, Severity, ActionType, Workload, AccountDisplayName, UserId, DeviceName, SettingName, IPAddress
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent High-Signal Activity

content.json:
---
## Activity Explorer
Explore all Defender XDR audit activity, then pivot by actor, workload, or action type.

### Activity Explorer help
- Use this section first when validating ingestion because it exposes raw events and `RawEventData`.
- Reproduce by completing any Defender XDR admin action in a test tenant, then search here for the expected `ActionType` or actor.
- If an expected event is missing here, the issue is data collection or event generation, not the downstream visualizations.

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload)
| where Workload contains "Defender"
| extend UserId = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).UserId)
| extend DeviceName = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).DeviceName)
| extend ActionComment = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).ActionComment)
| extend ResultDescription = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).ResultDescription)
| project TimeGenerated, Workload, ActionType, AccountDisplayName, UserId, DeviceName, IPAddress, ActionComment, ResultDescription, RawEventData
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 500
content.title: All Defender XDR Audit Events

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload)
| where Workload contains "Defender"
| summarize Events = count(), Actions = dcount(ActionType), Devices = dcount(tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).DeviceName)) by AccountDisplayName
| where isnotempty(AccountDisplayName)
| top 25 by Events desc
content.title: Top Actors

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload)
| where Workload contains "Defender"
| summarize Events = count() by Workload, ActionType
| top 50 by Events desc
content.title: Workload and Action Breakdown

content.json:
---
## High Risk
Prioritize actions that can reduce visibility, weaken controls, or materially change response posture.

### High Risk help
- Recommended lab validation steps: download a Defender for Endpoint offboarding package, isolate and release a test device, disable or delete a disposable test custom detection, and collect a benign file from a lab endpoint.
- Expected action types in this section include `DownloadOffboardingPkg`, `ReleaseFromIsolation`, `DeleteCustomDetection`, `ChangeCustomDetectionRuleStatus`, `LiveResponseGetFile`, and `DownloadFile`.
- Use dedicated test devices and non-production detections only.

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionType == "DownloadOffboardingPkg"
| extend UserId = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).UserId), ClientIP = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).ClientIP)
| project-rename InitiatedByAccountName = AccountDisplayName, InitiatedByAccountId = AccountId
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, InitiatedByAccountName, InitiatedByAccountId, UserId, ClientIP, ActionType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Offboarding Package Downloads

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionType == "ReleaseFromIsolation"
| extend ReleasedDevice = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).DeviceName), ReleaseComment = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).ActionComment)
| project-rename InitiatedByAccountName = AccountDisplayName, InitiatedByAccountId = AccountId
| lookup kind=leftouter (
    CloudAppEvents
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where ActionType == "IsolateDevice"
    | extend IsolatedDevice = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).DeviceName), IsolationComment = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).ActionComment), IsolationScope = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).ActionScope)
    | project-rename IsolationInitiatedByAccountName = AccountDisplayName, IsolationInitiatedByAccountId = AccountId, IsolationTime = TimeGenerated
    | project IsolationTime, IsolatedDevice, IsolationComment, IsolationScope, IsolationInitiatedByAccountName, IsolationInitiatedByAccountId
) on $left.ReleasedDevice == $right.IsolatedDevice
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, ReleasedDevice, ReleaseComment, InitiatedByAccountName, InitiatedByAccountId, IsolationTime, IsolationComment, IsolationScope, IsolationInitiatedByAccountName, IsolationInitiatedByAccountId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Devices Removed From Isolation

content.query:
let Deleted = CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionType == "DeleteCustomDetection"
| extend RuleName = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).RuleName), QueryText = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Query), Actor = AccountDisplayName, ChangeType = "Deleted"
| project TimeGenerated, ChangeType, Actor, RuleName, QueryText;
let Disabled = CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionType == "ChangeCustomDetectionRuleStatus"
| where tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).IsEnabled) == "false"
| extend RuleName = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).RuleName), QueryText = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Query), Actor = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).UserId), ChangeType = "Disabled"
| project TimeGenerated, ChangeType, Actor, RuleName, QueryText;
Deleted
| union Disabled
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Custom Detection Deletions and Disables

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionType in ('LiveResponseGetFile', 'DownloadFile')
| extend FileName = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).FileName), FileSHA256 = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).FileSHA256), FileSize = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).FileSize)
| project-rename InitiatedByAccountName = AccountDisplayName, InitiatedByAccountId = AccountId
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, InitiatedByAccountName, InitiatedByAccountId, IPAddress, FileName, FileSHA256, FileSize, ActionType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Files Collected From Hosts

content.json:
---
## Config Changes
Track changes that alter Defender XDR behavior, permissions, detections, and alert handling.

### Config Changes help
- Validate RBAC by adding or modifying a test Defender role assignment.
- Validate suppression auditing by creating a temporary alert suppression in a lab scope.
- Validate advanced feature auditing by toggling a test-safe setting, especially `Live Response unsigned script execution`, in a non-production tenant if possible.
- Expected action types here include events ending in `Role`, `ExclusionConfigurationAdded`, and `SetAdvancedFeatures`.

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload)
| where Workload contains "Defender"
| where ActionType endswith "Role"
| extend RoleName = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).RoleName), RolePermissions = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).RolePermissions), AssignedGroups = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).AssignedGroups)
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, ActionType, AccountDisplayName, AccountObjectId, RoleName, RolePermissions, AssignedGroups
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: RBAC Changes

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionType == "ExclusionConfigurationAdded"
| extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload), ResultStatus = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).ResultStatus), ResultDescription = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).ResultDescription)
| project-rename InitiatedByAccountName = AccountDisplayName, InitiatedByAccountId = AccountId
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, Workload, ResultDescription, ResultStatus, InitiatedByAccountName, InitiatedByAccountId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Alert Suppressions Added

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionType == "SetAdvancedFeatures"
| extend Workload = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Workload), SettingName = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).SettingName), SettingsNewValue = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).SettingsNewValue), UserId = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).UserId)
| extend ChangeRisk = case(
    SettingName == "Live Response unsigned script execution" and SettingsNewValue in ("true", "1"), "High",
    SettingsNewValue in ("false", "0"), "High",
    "Review"
)
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, ChangeRisk, Workload, SettingName, SettingsNewValue, AccountDisplayName, UserId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Advanced Feature Changes

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionType == "SetAdvancedFeatures"
| extend SettingName = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).SettingName), SettingsNewValue = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).SettingsNewValue)
| where SettingName == "Live Response unsigned script execution"
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, AccountDisplayName, AccountId, ActionType, SettingName, SettingsNewValue
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Live Response Unsigned Script Setting Changes

content.json:
---
## Extended Audit
Additional activity I recommend reviewing regularly because it reflects response operations, data access, and platform integration changes.

### Extended Audit help
- Validate device response actions by isolating a lab device and running a manual AV scan.
- Validate integration monitoring by disconnecting and reconnecting a Sentinel workspace only in a controlled lab if you specifically need to test that event.
- Validate sensor deletion only in an isolated test environment because it is disruptive.
- Expected action types here include `IsolateDevice`, `RunAntiVirusScan`, `SentinelDisconnectWorkspace`, and `SensorDeleted`.

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionType == "IsolateDevice"
| extend IsolatedDevice = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).DeviceName), IsolationComment = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).ActionComment), IsolationScope = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).ActionScope)
| project-rename InitiatedByAccountName = AccountDisplayName, InitiatedByAccountId = AccountId
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, IsolatedDevice, IsolationComment, IsolationScope, InitiatedByAccountName, InitiatedByAccountId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Device Isolation Actions

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionType == "RunAntiVirusScan"
| extend DeviceName = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).DeviceName), ActionComment = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).ActionComment), ActionScope = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).ActionScope)
| summarize TotalAntivirusScans = count(), ScanTypes = make_set(ActionScope), Comments = make_set(ActionComment) by DeviceName
| order by TotalAntivirusScans desc
content.title: Manual Antivirus Scan Activity

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionType == "SentinelDisconnectWorkspace"
| extend WorkspaceId = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).WorkspaceId), Status = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).Status), SubscriptionId = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).SubscriptionId), ResourceGroup = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).ResourceGroup), WorkspaceType = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).WorkspaceType)
| project-rename InitiatedByAccountName = AccountDisplayName, InitiatedByAccountId = AccountId
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, InitiatedByAccountName, InitiatedByAccountId, IPAddress, WorkspaceType, Status, WorkspaceId, ResourceGroup, SubscriptionId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Sentinel Workspace Disconnects

content.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ActionType == "SensorDeleted"
| extend Sensor = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).ResultDescription), InitiatorUpn = tostring(parse_json(RawEventData).UserId)
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, Sensor, InitiatorUpn, AccountDisplayName, IPAddress
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Defender for Identity Sensor Deletions
